晴→雨.cn: 你这边晴得透亮，阿塔卡马竟落了场百年难遇的细雨。
晴→雨.en: It's bright and clear on your side, while a rare century drizzle falls on Atacama.

雨→晴.cn: 你窗外落着雨，阿塔卡马的沙漠正晒着太阳，夜里星空也会更亮。
雨→晴.en: Rain taps your window, while the Atacama desert basks in sun — the stars will shine even brighter tonight.

高温→低温.cn: 你熬着酷暑，阿塔卡马的夜晚正浸着沙漠独有的凉意。
高温→低温.en: You're sweltering in the heat, while Atacama nights cool down with that desert chill.

低温→高温.cn: 你裹着厚衣，阿塔卡马的白日正烧着盛夏的日光。
低温→高温.en: You're bundled up warm, while Atacama bakes in mid-summer daylight.

下雪→未下雪.cn: 你这里落着雪，阿塔卡马的沙丘上连雨都少见，更别提雪。
下雪→未下雪.en: Snow falls where you are, while even rain is rare on Atacama's dunes, let alone snow.

未下雪→下雪.cn: 你这边还没飘雪，阿塔卡马的沙丘上连雨都少见，更别提雪了。
未下雪→下雪.en: No snow yet on your side, while even rain is rare on Atacama's dunes, let alone snow.

晴→雨.cn: 你这边晴空万里，瓦尔帕莱索正落着潮润的海雨。
晴→雨.en: Clear skies above you, while damp coastal rain falls on Valparaíso.

雨→晴.cn: 你窗外雨不停，中央山谷的葡萄园正浸在透亮的阳光里。
雨→晴.en: Rain pours outside your window, while Central Valley vineyards glow in bright sun.

高温→低温.cn: 你顶着暑气，圣地亚哥正吹着从安第斯山下来的凉风。
高温→低温.en: You're stuck in the swelter, while cool Andean winds blow through Santiago.

低温→高温.cn: 你裹着寒意，葡萄正晒着盛夏的日光，慢慢攒着糖分。
低温→高温.en: You're wrapped in chill, while grapes ripen and build sugar in the summer sun.

下雪→未下雪.cn: 你这里飘着雪，瓦尔帕莱索的海边还吹着夏末温温的风。
下雪→未下雪.en: Snow drifts where you are, while late summer breezes still blow warm along Valparaíso's coast.

未下雪→下雪.cn: 你这边还没飘雪，安第斯山的巅已经积了薄薄一层新雪。
未下雪→下雪.en: No snow yet on your side, while fresh dustings settle on the Andean peaks.

晴→雨.cn: 你这边天朗气清，南智利的峡湾正飘着夹雪的冷雨。
晴→雨.en: Clear skies on your side, while sleety cold rain drifts through southern Chile's fjords.

雨→晴.cn: 你窗外阴着雨，巴塔哥尼亚的冰川正映着晴光。
雨→晴.en: Gloomy rain outside your window, while Patagonian glaciers shine in clear sun.

高温→低温.cn: 你熬着三伏天，峡湾正处在一年里最冷的时节。
高温→低温.en: You're in the dog days of summer, while the fjords hit their coldest time of year.

低温→高温.cn: 你裹着深冬的寒，南智利正过着短暂又透亮的夏日。
低温→高温.en: You're deep in winter cold, while southern Chile has its short, bright summer days.

下雪→未下雪.cn: 你这里落着大雪，峡湾入海口还飘着冷雨，没凝成雪。
下雪→未下雪.en: Heavy snow traps you indoors, while cold rain falls at the fjord mouths, not yet turned to snow.

未下雪→下雪.cn: 你这边还没见雪，巴塔哥尼亚的峡湾已经落了头一场雪。
未下雪→下雪.en: No snow yet on your side, while the first snow falls on Patagonia's fjords.

晴→雨.cn: 你头顶艳阳高照，潘帕斯正落着一场慢悠悠的长雨，像马孔多的下午。
晴→雨.en: Bright sun above you, while a slow, long rain falls on the Pampas — like an afternoon in Macondo.

雨→晴.cn: 你窗外雨淅淅沥沥，潘帕斯草原正晒着太阳，风里全是青草味。
雨→晴.en: Drizzle taps your window, while the Pampas bake in sun, the wind smelling of fresh grass.

高温→低温.cn: 你顶着盛夏的热，潘帕斯的草正泛着枯黄，吹着初冬的风。
高温→低温.en: You're in peak summer heat, while the Pampas fade to gold in early winter winds.

低温→高温.cn: 你裹着冬衣，潘帕斯的草正疯长，盛夏的风暖乎乎的。
低温→高温.en: You're bundled in winter clothes, while Pampas grass grows wild in warm summer winds.

下雪→未下雪.cn: 你这里飘着鹅毛雪，潘帕斯草原上连霜都少见。
下雪→未下雪.en: Thick snow falls where you are, while even frost is rare on the Pampas.

未下雪→下雪.cn: 你这边还没飘雪，潘帕斯草原上连霜都少见，更别提雪了。
未下雪→下雪.en: No snow yet on your side, while even frost is rare on the Pampas, let alone snow.

晴→雨.cn: 你这边晴得透亮，门多萨的葡萄园正落着细碎的细雨。
晴→雨.en: Bright clear sun on your side, while fine light drizzle falls on Mendoza's vineyards.

雨→晴.cn: 你窗外阴着雨，门多萨的葡萄正晒着高海拔的日光。
雨→晴.en: Gloomy rain outside your window, while Mendoza's grapes soak up high-altitude sunlight.

高温→低温.cn: 你熬着酷暑，山麓正吹着雪山上下来的凉风。
高温→低温.en: You're sweltering through summer, while cool mountain winds blow down the Andean foothills.

低温→高温.cn: 你裹着寒意，葡萄正晒着盛夏的光，慢慢攒着果香。
低温→高温.en: You're wrapped in chill, while grapes build aroma and sugar in mid-summer sun.

下雪→未下雪.cn: 你这里落着雪，山下的葡萄园里还只是微凉的雨。
下雪→未下雪.en: Snow falls where you are, while only cool light rain falls on the valley vineyards.

未下雪→下雪.cn: 你这边还没飘雪，安第斯山的雪线又往山麓靠近了一点。
未下雪→下雪.en: No snow yet on your side, while the Andean snowline creeps closer to the foothills.

晴→雨.cn: 你这边风和日丽，巴塔哥尼亚正刮着带雨的狂风。
晴→雨.en: Calm sunny weather on your side, while wild rainy winds howl across Patagonia.

雨→晴.cn: 你窗外雨不停，巴塔哥尼亚的雪山正映着晴光。
雨→晴.en: Nonstop rain outside your window, while Patagonia's snow peaks glow in clear sun.

高温→低温.cn: 你顶着三伏的热，荒原正刮着刺骨的寒风。
高温→低温.en: You're in the summer heat, while biting cold winds sweep the Patagonian steppe.

低温→高温.cn: 你裹着深冬的寒，巴塔哥尼亚正过着一年里最暖和的日子。
低温→高温.en: You're deep in winter cold, while Patagonia has its warmest days of the year.

下雪→未下雪.cn: 你这里大雪封路，巴塔哥尼亚的湖畔还吹着凉风，没见雪。
下雪→未下雪.en: Heavy snow blocks the roads where you are, while cool wind blows by Patagonian lakes, no snow in sight.

未下雪→下雪.cn: 你这边还没飘雪，巴塔哥尼亚的荒原已经盖了厚厚的雪。
未下雪→下雪.en: No snow yet on your side, while thick snow covers the Patagonian steppe.

晴→雨.cn: 你这边晴空万里，南太平洋的海面正落着一场无声的雨。
晴→雨.en: Clear skies above you, while a silent rain falls on the South Pacific surface.

雨→晴.cn: 你窗外雨淅沥，南太平洋的海面正闪着碎金似的阳光。
雨→晴.en: Drizzle taps your window, while sunlight glints like scattered gold on the South Pacific.

高温→低温.cn: 你熬着酷暑，秘鲁寒流裹着南极的寒意，正扫过洋面。
高温→低温.en: You're sweltering in the heat, while the frigid Humboldt Current sweeps across the ocean, carrying Antarctic chill.

低温→高温.cn: 你裹着寒意，南太平洋的海面正晒着盛夏的日光。
低温→高温.en: You're wrapped in chill, while the South Pacific surface basks in summer sunlight.

下雪→未下雪.cn: 你这里落着雪，南太平洋的海面只飘着冷雨，凝不成雪。
下雪→未下雪.en: Snow falls where you are, while only cold rain drifts over the South Pacific, never turning to snow.

未下雪→下雪.cn: 你这边还没见雪，南太平洋的最南端正飘着细碎的雪粒。
未下雪→下雪.en: No snow yet on your side, while fine snow grains drift over the far southern Pacific.

晴→雨.cn: 你这边天朗气清，南大西洋的洋面上正落着一场远洋的雨。
晴→雨.en: Clear skies on your side, while an ocean rain falls on the South Atlantic.

雨→晴.cn: 你窗外阴着雨，南大西洋的海面正映着透亮的天光。
雨→晴.en: Gloomy rain outside your window, while clear light reflects off the South Atlantic surface.

高温→低温.cn: 你顶着暑气，南大西洋的海水正浸着冬日的凉意。
高温→低温.en: You're stuck in the heat, while South Atlantic waters hold the chill of winter.

低温→高温.cn: 你裹着冬衣，南大西洋的海面正晒着暖融融的夏日阳光。
低温→高温.en: You're bundled in winter clothes, while the South Atlantic basks in warm summer sun.

下雪→未下雪.cn: 你这里落着雪，南大西洋的海面只飘着冷雨。
下雪→未下雪.en: Snow falls where you are, while only cold rain drifts over the South Atlantic.

未下雪→下雪.cn: 你这边还没见雪，南大西洋的最南端正飘着湿冷的雪。
未下雪→下雪.en: No snow yet on your side, while damp cold snow falls over the far southern Atlantic.
